title: A Frolic.
content:
Bring me my rosebuds, drawer, come;
    So, while I thus sit crown'd,
    I'll drink the aged C�cubum,
    Until the roof turn round.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "A Frolic."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
